texto: I am aware always that the powers that be are so strong, we can not go headlong to pit our forces, it would be suicidal, so we had that position. Which Lenin himself said that 'it is not only foolish to launch an armed revolution but it is a leftist criminal adventurism when the people are not ready to support it.' The people are not ready, they don't even understand what we are talking about.. . . Yes, even socialism is not yet understood by people, much less communism. And the rich are very afraid of communism because it means confiscation of their wealth and liquidation of their lives.
explicacao: Citação de Luis Taruc sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I am aware always that the powers that be are so strong, we can not go headlong to pit our forces…” articula autoestima, armed-revolution, communism em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como communism e leftist-adventurism.
